NexusAppSettings.MacKeyFormatNote: If a MacKeys entry is configured, Format defaults to Utf8 when omitted.
NexusAppSettings.MacKeyAlternativeFormatNote: Alternative MacKey formats: Hex, Base64, or Base64UrlEncoded; decoded bytes must be exactly 32.

DrnAppFeatures.SeedKeyNote: Development default Nexus MAC key is deterministic. When no default NexusAppSettings:MacKeys entry is configured, AppSettings derives AppHashKey, AppEncryptionKey and AppKey from this SeedKey, then hashes those values into a Base64UrlEncoded 32-byte MAC key. Changing SeedKey changes that generated key and IDs created with the previous key will require the previous key in MacKeys for parsing.
DrnAppFeatures.SeedKey: Our true mentor in life is science! - Mustafa Kemal Atatürk (1924)
